name: neon-smoke
description: Small deterministic retrieval fixture based on Neon documentation-style queries.

documents.title: Neon serverless driver
Direct connection for Prisma CLI
documents.content:
# Direct connection for Prisma CLI

Use a pooled connection string for application runtime and a direct connection string for Prisma schema operations. Set DATABASE_URL to the pooled connection and DIRECT_URL for prisma migrate or db push.

documents.title: Branching with the Neon API
documents.content:
# Branching with the Neon API

Create schema-only branches with init_source set to schema-only. Restore a branch using the branch restore endpoint when you need to recover data.

documents.title: Neon CLI command: branches
documents.content:
# Neon CLI command: branches

Use neonctl branches reset development --parent to reset a child branch. Use neonctl branches restore to restore a branch to a specific point in time.

documents.title: Connect a NestJS application to Neon
documents.content:
# Connect a NestJS application to Neon

Create a NestJS service that reads environment variables, opens a PostgreSQL connection, and queries a table from a controller endpoint.
